name: POLICY-BUG-2
title: test-rule-files-content.py comment claims 'four rule files' but only three exist
description: test-rule-files-content.py line 2 comment reads 'Spot-checks content of the four rule files.' but the feature only has three rule files: philosophy.md, spec-rules.md, coding-rules.md (per spec.md Surface and contract.md provides.files). The 'four' is a stale reference (likely from when workflow-rules.md existed). Should be changed to 'three rule files'. Location: .claude/features/policy/test/test-rule-files-content.py line 2.
